scripts.build: npm run build -w saas-super-admin -w pos-client -w customer-portal -w merchant-office
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev -w merchant-office"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev -w merchant-office" "npm run dev -w pos-client" "npm run dev -w customer-portal" "npm run dev -w saas-super-admin"
scripts.dev:merchant: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev -w merchant-office"
scripts.dev:pos: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev -w pos-client"
scripts.dev:customer: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev -w customer-portal"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev -w saas-super-admin"
